name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan represents a significant restructuring of the data pipeline, architecture, and training strategy compared to the old plan. While some goals overlap (e.g., data loading, architecture, training, evaluation), the specific implementation details (e.g., caching statistics, curriculum learning, dual-stream input, specific loss components) are sufficiently different that the previous steps cannot be reused as-is. The new plan is a complete re-specification of the workflow.
